productDisplayName: Nike Men T90 Exacto White Sports Shoes
description: Choose the nike T90 Exacto IV for power and accuracy. Designed for the elite player who kicks with force and passes with purpose, the nike T90 Exacto Soccer Cleat is built to overpower the competition on harder natural surfaces. Upper Synthetic leather upper for comfort and great ball feel Shot shield aids in performance on instep/swerve striking and shot accuracy Lateral plastic support helps lock down the heel for a secure Fit and also helps to stabilize the planting foot when kicking the ball Off-center lacing system is designed to provide a larger ball striking surface for more uniform cleat-to-ball contact Midsole Instep pods deliver even pressure on the ball at impact for optimal precision at high speeds High-density EVA sockliner provides contoured heel and arch support and reduces cleat pressure Outsole Firm-ground cleats for use on short-grass fields that may be slightly wet but rarely muddy Forefoot flex groove enhances flexibility for a more natural, efficient range of motion shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
